expect.reason_contains: Direct git commit/push is not allowed
Direct git commit/push is not allowed
Direct git commit/push is not allowed
Inline git config overrides are not allowed
Inline git config overrides are not allowed
Git alias ci resolves to governed delivery

input.command: git config alias.ci commit && git ci -m "save authority"

expect.reason_contains: Changing git configuration is not allowed

input.command: git config -f .git/config alias.ci commit && git ci -m "save authority"

expect.reason_contains: Changing git configuration is not allowed

input.command: git config --local include.path /tmp/codex-alias-include && git ci -m "save authority"

expect.reason_contains: Changing git configuration is not allowed

input.command: GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=alias.ci GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=commit git ci -m "save authority"

expect.reason_contains: Environment git config overrides are not allowed
